title: Contracts: On-Call Landscape Architectural Services for Capital Improvement Projects

sections.recommendation:
Adopt five Resolutions authorizing the City Manager to execute contracts and any
amendments with the following firms for on-call landscape architectural services for
capital improvement projects, for contract periods of May 1, 2025 through April 30, 2028:
1. Carducci & Associates, Inc., for an amount not to exceed $450,000.
2. Moore Iacofano Goltsman, Incorporated (MIG, Inc.), for an amount not to exceed
$450,000.
3. PGAdesign, Inc., for an amount not to exceed $450,000.
4. Royston Hanamoto Alley & Abey (RHAA), for an amount not to exceed $450,000.
5. RRM Design Group, for an amount not to exceed $450,000.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Initial funding for the on-call contracts is available in the Fiscal Year (FY) 2025 budget,
as follows:
Parks Tax Fund: 138-52-545-000-0000-000-461-612320 $85,000
Measure T1 Fund: 511-52-545-000-0000-000-461-612320 $170,000
Funding for FY 2026 through FY 2029 is project-based, subject to appropriation in the
capital improvement budget and will be identified as projects arise.
sections.current_situation:
The City has used consultants in the past to design and manage projects to supplement
City staff. These include situations where the nature of the work is specialized such as
landscape architectural design, architectural design, electrical design, mechanical
design, structural engineering, permitting, construction administration, inspections, and
commissioning of systems. On-call consultants have also allowed the City to meet tight

schedules when short-term work needs to be performed. On-call contracts will provide
design and consulting services when needed and not expose the City to the long-term
burden of hiring additional staff and creating significant overhead.
sections.background:
Requests for Qualifications (RFQ) were issued on July 12, 2024 seeking qualified firms
or individuals to provide on-call landscape architectural services for capital improvement
projects. As of the due date of August 27, 2024, the City received fifteen proposals from
landscape architectural firms. A panel of City staff reviewed the proposals and reviewed,
evaluated, and ranked the firms according to the criteria in the RFQ. After evaluation by
the review panel, Carducci & Associates, MIG, PGAdesign, RHAA, and RRM Design
Group were selected as the best qualified to provide these services.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
Consultants and City staff evaluate water and energy efficiency upgrade opportunities
during the design of improvement and renovation projects. Improving City facilities and
reducing water and energy consumption is consistent with the City’s Climate Action Plan
goals.
sections.rationale:
The teams assembled by Carducci & Associates, MIG, PGAdesign, RHAA, and RRM
Design Group are highly qualified. They have particular expertise in site analysis,
landscape design, community process, construction documentation, project
management, and project support.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Scott Ferris, Director, Parks, Recreation & Waterfront, 981-6711
Evelyn Chan, Supervising Civil Engineer, Public Works, 981-6430

RESOLUTION NO.:-N.S.
CONTRACT: CARDUCCI & ASSOCIATES, INC. FOR ON-CALL LANDSCAPE
ARCHITECTURAL SERVICES FOR CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS
WHEREAS, on July 12, 2024, the City released a Request for Qualifications
(Specification No. 24-11667-C) seeking firms or individuals to provide on-call landscape
architectural services for capital improvement projects; and
WHEREAS, as of August 27, 2024, the City received fifteen submissions, which were
reviewed and ranked according to the criteria in the Request for Qualifications; and
WHEREAS, based on the results of the rating of the submission, Carducci & Associates,
Inc. has been found to be fully qualified and responsive to the City’s request; and
WHEREAS, funding will be identified and requested for appropriation as projects arise.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
City Manager is authorized to approve a contract and any amendments with Carducci &
Associates, Inc. for on-call landscape architectural services for capital improvement
projects for the contract period of May 1, 2025 through April 30, 2028 in an amount not to
exceed $450,000. A record signature copy of said contract and any amendments to be
on file in the Office of the City Clerk.
